summary: Weather Shadow-Mode & Forecast Accuracy Testing - All 30 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. Shadow-mode enable/reset, forecast accuracy tracking, calibration visibility, and all new API endpoints working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Badge shows 'UNKNOWN' when engine is stopped - this is because get_health() returns 'unknown' when state.trading_mode cannot be determined
ui_bugs.note: Not a bug - expected behavior when engine hasn't been started

backend_api_tests: GET /api/strategies/weather/shadow-summary - returns execution_mode, is_shadow, shadow_overrides_applied, config_snapshot, operational_stats, calibration, running fields
GET /api/strategies/weather/shadow-summary - config_snapshot has min_edge_bps, kelly_scale, max_signal_size, max_concurrent_signals, max_stale_market_seconds, cooldown_seconds, default_size
GET /api/strategies/weather/shadow-summary - operational_stats has total_scans, markets_classified, forecasts_fetched, signals_generated, signals_executed, signals_filled
POST /api/strategies/weather/shadow/enable - returns status='shadow_overrides_applied' and config

POST /api/strategies/weather/shadow/enable - applies conservative overrides (min_edge_bps=500, kelly_scale=0.15, max_stale_market_seconds=600, cooldown_seconds=2400, max_concurrent_signals=4, max_signal_size=5, default_size=2)
POST /api/strategies/weather/shadow/enable - reflected in shadow-summary endpoint
POST /api/strategies/weather/shadow/reset - returns status='config_reset_to_defaults' and config

POST /api/strategies/weather/shadow/reset - restores defaults (min_edge_bps=300, kelly_scale=0.25, max_stale_market_seconds=120, cooldown_seconds=1800, max_concurrent_signals=8, max_signal_size=8, default_size=3)
GET /api/strategies/weather/accuracy/history - returns list of ForecastAccuracyRecords from MongoDB
GET /api/strategies/weather/accuracy/history?limit=5 - respects limit parameter
GET /api/strategies/weather/accuracy/history?station_id=KLGA - filters by station_id
GET /api/strategies/weather/accuracy/history - record has station_id, target_date, forecast_high_f, sigma_used, lead_hours, resolved, observed_high_f, forecast_error_f, abs_error_f

GET /api/strategies/weather/accuracy/calibration - returns total_records, resolved_records, pending_resolution, stations_with_data, stations_calibratable, global_mae_f, global_bias_f, using_defaults, calibration_status, calibration_note, station_summaries
GET /api/strategies/weather/accuracy/calibration - calibration_status is 'collecting' (valid value from no_data/collecting/partial/ready)
GET /api/strategies/weather/accuracy/calibration - station_summaries contains KLGA with sample_count=1, mean_abs_error_f=4.3, mean_bias_f=-4.3, calibration_meaningful=false
GET /api/strategies/weather/accuracy/unresolved - returns list of pending forecasts with resolved=false
GET /api/strategies/weather/accuracy/unresolved - all returned records have resolved=false
POST /api/strategies/weather/accuracy/resolve - validates required fields (station_id, target_date, observed_high_f)
POST /api/strategies/weather/accuracy/resolve - returns 400 when fields missing
POST /api/strategies/weather/accuracy/resolve - returns 200 with status='resolved' on valid input
GET /api/strategies/weather/health - returns 200 with config, running fields (regression)
GET /api/strategies/weather/signals - returns 200 with tradable, rejected, total_tradable, total_rejected (regression)
GET /api/strategies/weather/executions - returns 200 with active, completed (regression)
GET /api/strategies/weather/forecasts - returns 200 with dict (regression)
GET /api/strategies/weather/stations - returns 200 with list of registered stations (regression)
GET /api/strategies/weather/config - returns 200 with enabled and config params (regression)
GET /api/demo/strategies/weather/shadow-summary - returns demo shadow summary data
GET /api/demo/strategies/weather/accuracy/history - returns empty list for demo
GET /api/demo/strategies/weather/accuracy/calibration - returns demo calibration health
MongoDB 'forecast_accuracy' collection is used correctly - verified via calibration endpoint returning 25 total records, 1 resolved
frontend_ui_tests: Weather Trader heading visible with PAPER/SHADOW mode badge (data-testid='weather-exec-mode-badge')
All 6 tabs present: Signals(0), Rejected(0), Executions(0), Forecasts(0), Calibration, Health
Calibration tab - Shadow Summary section (data-testid='section-shadow-summary') renders with Shadow Config and Operational Stats columns
Calibration tab - Calibration Health section (data-testid='section-calibration-health') shows status, using_defaults, total/resolved/pending records, global MAE/Bias
Calibration tab - Per-Station Accuracy section (data-testid='section-station-accuracy') shows KLGA with 1 sample, MAE 4.3F, Bias -4.3F
Calibration tab - Forecast Accuracy Log section (data-testid='section-accuracy-log') shows table with forecast records
Calibration tab - Shadow mode badge (data-testid='shadow-mode-badge') shows current mode
Health tab - Scanner Metrics section (data-testid='section-weather-metrics') renders
Health tab - Feed Health section (data-testid='section-weather-feed-health') renders
Health tab - Rejection Reasons section (data-testid='section-weather-rejections') renders
Health tab - Strategy Config section (data-testid='section-weather-config') renders
Health tab - Classified Markets section (data-testid='section-weather-classified') renders
Signals, Rejected, Executions, Forecasts tabs all clickable and switch content correctly

seed_data_creation: 25 ForecastAccuracyRecords were created by engine run (recorded by main agent context). 1 record resolved for KLGA 2026-03-14 (forecast=47.3F, actual=43F, error=-4.3F)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Weather Shadow-Mode & Forecast Accuracy feature fully implemented. KEY FEATURES: (1) Shadow config overrides applied via POST /api/strategies/weather/shadow/enable with conservative values (min_edge=500bps, kelly=0.15, max_stale=600s, cooldown=2400s, max_concurrent=4, max_size=5, default_size=2) (2) Reset to defaults via POST /api/strategies/weather/shadow/reset (3) Forecast accuracy records in MongoDB 'forecast_accuracy' collection - 25 records created, 1 resolved (4) Calibration health endpoint shows status='collecting', using_defaults=true, global_mae=4.3F (5) Weather page has 6 tabs: Signals, Rejected, Executions, Forecasts, Calibration, Health (6) Calibration tab shows: Shadow-Mode Summary, Calibration Health, Per-Station Accuracy, Forecast Accuracy Log (7) Engine currently stopped, mode shows 'unknown' in badges which is expected. All existing weather endpoints work correctly (no regression).

features_tested.accuracy_resolve_endpoint: PASS - POST /api/strategies/weather/accuracy/resolve validates and accepts input
features_tested.forecast_accuracy_records_created: PASS - 25 records in MongoDB from engine scan (verified by calibration endpoint)
features_tested.weather_page_calibration_tab: PASS - Renders Shadow Summary, Calibration Health, Per-Station Accuracy, Accuracy Log sections
features_tested.weather_page_mode_badge: PASS - PAPER/SHADOW badge visible next to Weather Trader heading
features_tested.existing_tabs_work: PASS - Signals, Rejected, Executions, Forecasts tabs still work
features_tested.health_tab_all_sections: PASS - All 6 existing sections render in Health tab
features_tested.demo_mode_endpoints: PASS - Demo shadow-summary and accuracy endpoints return placeholder data
